name: Watch playlist in sequence and replay after the last video
fullName: Test Sequential Playlist: Watch playlist in sequence and replay after the last video

steps.name: Given user logs in as "pankaj@kpoint.com" with password "admin_password"
When user plays the playlist "Sequential New Playlist"
Then the videos should play in sequential order
